commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3916a71931b9db054a1008b14ef80dbb9a637a5a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu drive `list` pagination inputs, scoped `info` lookup, pagination loops in `drive.ts`, and mocked regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +150. Total +205 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: `listFolder` only sends `folder_token`, the schema cannot accept a returned cursor, and `getFileInfo` searches one `drive.file.list` response before throwing; I did not run a live Feishu tenant reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is maintainer/contributor review: the PR needs real Feishu proof, a decision or repair for `list.all`, skill-doc alignment, and coordination with the sibling PR.

target.title: fix(feishu): add pagination support for drive list and info
target.body:
## Summary

Feishu drive list/info missing pagination support

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts`: Add page_size, page_token, and all parameters
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`: Add pagination loop for listFolder and getFileInfo

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu drive list and info actions lacked pagination, failing when folders contain more than 10 items (the default page size).

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93928-feishu-drive-pagination.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts --reporter=verbose

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts --reporter=verbose
 RUN  v4.1.8

 ✓ forwards list pagination cursors and returns continuation metadata
 ✓ searches subsequent drive pages for info while preserving folder scope
 ✓ registers feishu_drive and handles comment actions
 ✓ defaults add_comment file_type to docx when omitted
 ... (17 tests total, all passing)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  17 passed (17)
   Duration  6.52s
```

Pagination-specific tests pass, verifying:
- List pagination cursors are forwarded across pages
- Subsequent drive pages are searched for file info
- Continuation metadata is returned correctly
- Folder scope is preserved across paginated lookups

Observed result after fix: All 17 drive tests pass, including the two pagination-specific tests that verify the has_more + page_token loop. The pagination logic matches the existing pattern used elsewhere in the codebase.

What was not tested: End-to-end with a real Feishu tenant with >10 items in a folder (requires platform-specific credentials).

Closes: #93928
target.author: ajwan8998
